child.title: You are doing great!
child.subtitle: Here are some encouraging messages for your day.
child.imageAlt: A happy celebration with smiling faces cheering you on.
child.imageCaption: Your cheer squad is celebrating you!
child.message1: Every small step you take today matters.
child.message2: Your effort is stronger than any challenge.
child.message3: Keep going, you are building something amazing.
child.quote1: "Believe you can, and you are halfway there."
child.quote2: "Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out."
child.quote3: "You are braver than you believe, and stronger than you seem."

welcome.title: Getting started with LifeRadar
welcome.intro: LifeRadar helps you organise, evaluate, and improve every dimension of your life — all in one place.
